description: RFC-0017 business KPIs for the local-stack fleet — one row per domain, built off the exact OTel instruments each service ships.
title: Microservices — Business KPIs (local)

panels.title: Card decline rate
panels.description: Share of authorization attempts the provider declined.

panels.title: Authorization outcomes
panels.description: Authorize attempts by outcome (authorized / declined / error).

panels.title: Provider-hop latency p95 (mockpay)
panels.description: RFC-0017 W2 money-hop SLI: mockpay call latency per op.

panels.title: Reconciliation discrepancies
panels.description: Ledger-vs-provider mismatches found by the reconciler (should be ~0).

panels.title: Saga outcomes
panels.description: Terminal outcome of the order saga per run.

panels.title: Failed compensations (stuck money)
panels.description: Compensations that failed — the money-stuck signal. Target 0.

panels.title: Compensation steps
panels.description: Which saga step compensated and whether the compensation succeeded.

panels.title: Refresh rotations by outcome
panels.description: rotated / invalid / expired / reuse_detected (stolen-token replay signal).

panels.title: bcrypt latency p95
panels.description: hash (register) / compare (login) — the CPU cost inside auth latency.

panels.title: Cache pool usage (Valkey)
panels.description: redisotel go-redis pool: conns by state (idle/used). Old-semconv name — this is the CACHE pool, not Postgres.

panels.title: Cache conn use-time p95 (Valkey)
panels.description: How long a checked-out cache conn is held per op (redisotel, ms histogram).

panels.title: Lookups by kind & found
panels.description: Shipment lookups and whether the record was found.

panels.title: Rating distribution
panels.description: Star-rating distribution of newly created reviews (1–5).

panels.title: Average rating
panels.description: Mean star rating of new reviews.

panels.title: Quality signals
panels.description: Duplicate-review rejections and silently-truncated gRPC review reads.

panels.title: Price-changed on confirm
panels.description: Quote drifted between session start and confirm.
